hello

the company doc has been declined

and you can check the status
room.join
hi, i just paid for my number. Can i receive sms messages now or am i supposed to do something else before in terms of set up
hello?
you can send the SMS directly to the number 85257451729 and find the message in the SMS report (click Detail on each record, if there's any)
I just tested it from my phone number but nothing arrived
Let me check it
Could you provide the SMS time and sender for us to check?
Checking the record
I just tried a cal...and this works...but sms doesnt arrive at all. I dont see it in the interface
Could I have your service name again ?
xxxx.cinnox.com
ppconsultancyltd
thank you, let me have a look
Check almost all record and find no yours
Did you phone device support International SMS sending?
room.join
yes, of course. I also tried calling and this worked. Only sms doesnt work
Could you check with your local provider to check if the SMS was sent? Because we checked the logs and didn't see the SMS
We sent from 2 different bulgarian providers by now, nothing arrived.
Ill ask 2 friends abroad to send sms messages as well
this is the response from one friend.
we will check with the responsible team tomorrow as we also tested with our number and it seems the route needs to be adjusted
okay, i would appreciate it if you could handle with high priority. I need a stable HK number to receive sms messages
the SMS you are going to receive come from various countries right?
yes
but mainly hong kong
I will drop you an email with updates the soonest possible
ok
hi, this morning, i tried to receive several OTP sms messages from my bank, but nothing came through. Bank is located in Hong Kong.
could you share the timestamp?
From the SMS records, could see several tests between 18:20~20:17, but don't see test records in the morning
Which timezone?
GMT+8
so how come these sms messages didnt arrive?
Let us check the route settings with the team during office hours
ok
I will drop you an email
Sure, no problem
thanks
Thanks for your patience
hi, i havent heard fvrom you by email...
excuse me, we found the differences between the receipt ones and the undelivered one, R&D team is investigating
ok. Pls advise at your earliest convenience. If you need me to conduct another test, let me know.
we can test with our system too. We identified the difference. It's about a symbol # in the Sender ID. With this symbol, CINNOX cannot receive the message
but we cannot determine the sender ID ..so we are trying to see what we can do to let it pass to CINNOX
